text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Flash! This is a once-in-a-lifetime request! You
gotta do a concert with me!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Didn't you say that about your last request too?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm sure I did, but I reeeally mean it this time!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
When I was watching your last concert... You
looked so cool, but also cute at the same time!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I just know that performing with you would take
me to a whole other level! Soooo... please? ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Your praise is appreciated, but my schedule for
the next while is set, I'm afraid...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There must be something you can do! I want to
show your fans a whole new world!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I can't possibly let my friend's Umadol potential go to waste! ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Okay. I see you've made up your mind, so I'll
adjust my schedule.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yippee! ☆ Thanks a bunch, Flash! We'll show your
fans the show of a lifetime!
